status_updates.summary: Kickoff complete. All parties aligned. Action items distributed and confirmed. No issues.
Mapping delivered on time. Review underway. Note: migration approach updated to single-phase.

items.label: Migration Approach
items.note: Switched to single-phase cutover per technical review Jan 14. DataBridge and CloudPeak notified.

status_updates.summary: Minor delay in mapping approval. Normal review cycle. On track for Feb 14.

items.label: Data Mapping Approval (Jan 22)
items.note: Review comments sent to DataBridge Jan 20. Awaiting response. Expected within a few days.

status_updates.summary: DataBridge personnel transition discovered. Re-engaged. Slight delay but Feb 14 target still active.

items.label: DataBridge Contact Situation
items.note: Tom Reyes (Solutions Architect) left DataBridge Jan 23. Not formally communicated. Aisha Patel is new technical lead. Mapping review comments were unread for 9 days.

items.label: Data Mapping Approval
items.note: DataBridge producing v1.2 — expected Feb 2. Architecture package to CloudPeak expected Feb 3.

items.label: February 14 Cutover
items.note: Feb 14 is still the target. CloudPeak needs architecture by Feb 3 to begin final config.

status_updates.summary: Feb 14 full cutover not achievable. CloudPeak security configuration requires 10-12 days for write-path compliance. Recommending revert to phased approach.

items.label: CloudPeak Security Config
items.note: Single-phase write-path requires HIPAA field-level audit logging, KMS key hierarchy, and network segmentation not in current environment. 10-12 business days to complete.

items.label: February 14 Cutover
items.note: Phase 1 (read-only) achievable on Feb 14. Phase 2 (write) not achievable before ~Mar 3 at earliest.

escalations: Recommending executive decision on Option A (revert to phased, Phase 1 Feb 14 / Phase 2 ~Mar 3) vs. Option B (delay full cutover to Feb 28).
